Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}I'll support you all from here. Now, is there anything I can do for you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I believe the furthest you've gotten is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Malebolge is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Cocytus is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Caina is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Antenora is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Ptolomea is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Judecca is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}It seems the furthest you can explore Empyrean is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_START
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Let's see... You're about to start exploring, right? Let's proceed slowly but surely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_ADD_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Please explore as much as you can for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_ADD_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}There must be something to that floor... Could you look into it some more?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_ADD_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}You should be done exploring this area. Could you maybe try another door?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSYS_END_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}A new door... And it'll take us to where we'll be fighting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSYS_END_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}...Sorry. I'm still trying to process all of this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 -1 0 0}Is this really for the best...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSYS_END_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}We'll have to fight Yukari-chan and Kirijo-senpai next... Then it'll all be over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 -1 0 0}Stay strong, Aigis. I'll be with you all the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSYS_END_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}Whatever's on the other side of that door... We'll all face it—together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}I might not be able to do much aside from providing support, but I want to witness the truth for myself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FIELDATTACK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}Oh, about what you found during your exploration—I'd like to take a closer look over at the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}Could you give me some time once we're back? Thanks, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
